title: Cat Litter Tray Box, Litter Box, Plastic Cat Open Top Litter Tray with Free Scoop Kitten Detachable Rim Easy Cleaning,48 x 40 x 20cm (Green)
features: Smart Design: Shell like structure open Cat Litter Tray with high rim can prevent spreading of Litter and urine spillage and offers your cat ample space for their needs while ensuring their privacy.
Premium Quality: Our Shell Litter Tray Toilet made from an environmentally friendly BPA-Free & Non-Toxic, Pet Safe plastic.
Detachable High Rim: Easily Unclip and Reattach for High Rim - Rounded Corners for Easy Cleaning.Bid farewell to persistent litter adhesion with our litter box's smoothly contoured edges.

Complete Cleaning: This cat litter box comes with a sturdy litter scoop that makes daily cleaning easier. It also features a clever attachment point that can be easily hooked onto the tray if desired.
Dimensions: 48 x 40 x 20cm. This cat litter box is built for durability,ensuring it withstands the test of time.
